who: HR operations in small to medium-sized accounting firms with 10-50 employees
offer: For HR operations in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10-50 employees, overdue compliance training causes regulatory penalties. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.

Indie Hackers posts and comments on workflows
DM outreach to HR operations with demo video
Community forums where HR operations share tools
try_it: Let users try Dashboard for tracking completion rates and Manual entry option for training records on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
